name: Unitree Go2 ROS 2 Jazzy
postCreateCommand: bash -c 'mkdir -p /ros2_ws && REPO="${REPO:-/workspaces/go2_ros2_sdk}" && [ -d "$REPO" ] || REPO=$(find /workspaces -maxdepth 1 -mindepth 1 -type d | head -1) && ln -snf "$REPO" /ros2_ws/src && bash /ros2_ws/src/.devcontainer/install.sh && /setup_workspace.sh'
